name: ethane
description: normal C-C; no isotopes; no charges

name: chloroform
description: normal H on C; should not match C-D or C-T

name: deuterochloroform
description: one explicit D on C; should match C-D

name: d3-methanol
description: three Ds on C; multiple C-D matches

name: d2o
description: D on O — no C-D match (no C in target)

name: tritiated methanol
description: three Ts on C; should match C-T but not C-D

name: ammonium
description: N-H+ but no C — should not match C-H+

name: methylammonium
description: C bonded to N which carries +1; positive charge is on N not H

name: methanide
description: carbon with negative charge — irrelevant to H+
